resources.string: A minimal black-and-white keyboard for the Light Phone. Two quick steps:
Setup complete. It will appear in every text field. Swipe down on the keyboard to close it.
Fix misspellings as you type, using built-in English and Hebrew dictionaries that also learn the words you use. Works fully offline. Other languages can download a dictionary in Languages.
Show a strip of tap-able word completions above the keys as you type. Off by default to keep the keyboard minimal.
Choose which languages the globe key cycles through. Each has its own layout and long-press accents. English and Hebrew include offline autocorrect; the others can download a dictionary below.
Offline autocorrect ready · tap to delete
Show a row of numbers above the letters.
Capitalize the first letter of each sentence (English).
Tap the space bar twice to insert “. ”.
Vibration strength on each key press. Tap to cycle.
Play the system click on each key press (follows your device\'s sound-effect volume).
How long to hold a key before its symbol or accents pop up. Tap to cycle.
How far you slide on the space bar to move the cursor one step. Tap to cycle.
Overall keyboard height. Tap to cycle.
Tip: hold the globe key (⚙) on the keyboard for a quick-settings panel — haptics, autocorrect, auto-capitalize, double-space and keyboard size, without leaving the app you\'re in.
Tap to choose which emoji appear in the keyboard\'s emoji panel. Dim = hidden.
Words the keyboard learned as you typed. Tap a word to forget it.
No saved words yet. As you type new words, they\'ll be added here.
English is private and on-device (downloads 40 MB once). Hebrew uses the phone\'s own voice service, which may need a connection.
